mapper.sql: select sl.stock_log_id, sl.warehouse_id, sl.product_id, sl.location_id, sl.batch_no, sl.bill_type, sl.bill_id, case when sl.bill_type in ('sale_order', 'sale_order_rollback') then so.order_no when sl.bill_type = 'sale_return' then sr.return_no else concat(upper(sl.bill_type), '-', sl.bill_id) end as bill_no, sl.in_out, sl.quantity, sl.price, sl.amount, sl.before_qty, sl.after_qty, sl.create_by, sl.create_time from wms_stock_log sl left join wms_sale_order so on so.sale_order_id = sl.bill_id and sl.bill_type in ('sale_order', 'sale_order_rollback') left join wms_sale_return sr on sr.sale_return_id = sl.bill_id and sl.bill_type = 'sale_return'
mapper.insert:
insert into wms_stock_log
warehouse_id, product_id, location_id, batch_no, bill_type, bill_id, in_out, quantity, price, amount, before_qty, after_qty, create_by, create_time,
#{warehouseId}, #{productId}, #{locationId}, #{batchNo}, #{billType}, #{billId}, #{inOut}, #{quantity}, #{price}, #{amount}, #{beforeQty}, #{afterQty}, #{createBy}, sysdate(),
mapper.delete:
delete from wms_stock_log where stock_log_id in
#{stockLogId}
